items.title: Reusable Modules
items.description: Reusable modules live inside `src/<pkg>/`; the layout enforces that they're accessed via install, not by accident.

items.title: pyproject Packaging
items.description: `pyproject.toml` tells the build backend that the package source is under `src/`.

items.title: CLI Tools
items.description: CLI entry points live inside the `src/` package and are exposed through console-script entries.

items.title: venv & virtualenv
items.description: `src/` layout assumes you install your package into a venv with `pip install -e .` — the two practices reinforce each other.

items.title: Integration Tests
items.description: Tests against an *installed* package (the src-layout default) catch packaging mistakes that a flat layout silently hides.
